metadata.description: Ad service experiencing increased response times due to memory pressure

fault.condition: Chaos Mesh JVM stress injecting heap memory pressure on ad service

propagations.condition: Chaos Mesh JVMChaos resource injects heap memory stress on ad service JVM
propagations.effect: Ad pods experience high heap memory usage and frequent garbage collection

propagations.condition: Ad pods under memory pressure respond slowly or fail requests
propagations.effect: Ad service experiences degraded performance with high latency and potential timeouts

propagations.condition: Frontend service calls to ad service timeout or return slowly
propagations.effect: Frontend pages load slowly or without advertisements, degrading user experience

propagations.effect: Users experience slow page loads through the proxy

actions: Identify and stop the JVM chaos experiment affecting ad service
Monitor ad service heap memory usage and garbage collection metrics
